✦ What's In The Kit ✦

3 Products. One Complete Solution.

Each product targets a different aspect of hair health — together they create results no single product can match.

1
Hair Oil · 100ml

Kesh Avatar Hair Oil

21 Ayurvedic herbs cold-pressed into a potent oil that penetrates roots, revives follicles and halts hair fall.

  • Apply 3–4×/week, massage into scalp
  • Leave 30–60 min or overnight
  • Wash with Kesh Avatar Shampoo
2
Herbal Shampoo · 200ml

Kesh Avatar Shampoo

Sulphate-free herbal formula that gently cleanses, eliminates dandruff and leaves hair visibly soft and shiny.

  • Lather onto wet scalp & hair
  • Leave 3–5 min, then rinse well
  • Use every 2–3 days
3
Hair Tablets · 60 Tabs

Kesh Avatar Tablets

Ashwagandha, biotin & Ayurvedic extracts that strengthen hair from within — the internal half of the system.

  • 2 tablets daily after meals
  • Take with water
  • Continue for at least 2 weeks

✦ FAQ ✦

Common Questions

How soon will I see results?+
Most customers notice reduced hair fall within 2–3 weeks. Visible improvement in thickness appears within 6–8 weeks. Complete the 3-month course for best results.
Is it safe for women?+
Yes, Kesh Avatar is designed for both men and women of all ages. If you are pregnant or breastfeeding, consult your doctor before taking the tablets.
Any side effects?+
No. Since Kesh Avatar is 100% Ayurvedic with no parabens, sulphates or harsh chemicals, there are no known side effects. Thousands of customers use it safely every day.
How do I use all 3 products?+
Apply the hair oil 3–4 times/week, leave 30–60 min, then wash with the shampoo. Take 2 tablets daily after meals. Use shampoo every 2–3 days for best results.
Do you deliver to my city? Is COD available?+
Yes! We deliver Pan India — every state and every city. Cash on Delivery is available. Just WhatsApp us at +91 91552 44142 or call to place your order easily.
